ns0:entry.ns0:title: I-Am-Jakoby/Flipper-Zero-BadUSB
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/I-Am-Jakoby/Flipper-Zero-BadUSB
Language: powershell
Repository for my flipper zero badUSB payloads. Now almost entirely plug and play.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KelvinTegelaar/CIPP-API
Language: powershell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Orange-Cyberdefense/GOAD
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Orange-Cyberdefense/GOAD
Language: powershell
game of active directory

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PowerShellMafia/PowerSploit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShellMafia/PowerSploit
Language: powershell
PowerSploit - A PowerShell Post-Exploitation Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Raphire/Win11Debloat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Raphire/Win11Debloat
Language: powershell
A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Romanitho/Winget-AutoUpdate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Romanitho/Winget-AutoUpdate
Language: powershell
WAU daily updates apps as system and notify connected users. (Allowlist and Blocklist support)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ScoopInstaller/Scoop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ScoopInstaller/Scoop
Language: powershell
A command-line installer for Windows.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
Language: powershell
Community-driven baseline to accelerate Intune adoption and learning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: actions/runner-images
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/actions/runner-images
Language: powershell
GitHub Actions runner images

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bwya77/vscode-dark-islands
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bwya77/vscode-dark-islands
Language: powershell
VSCode theme based off the easemate IDE and Jetbrains islands theme

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cisagov/ScubaGear
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cisagov/ScubaGear
Language: powershell
Automation to assess the state of your M365 tenant against CISA's baselines

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/core
Language: powershell
.NET news, announcements, release notes, and more!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hak5/usbrubberducky-payloads
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hak5/usbrubberducky-payloads
Language: powershell

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jenkinsci/docker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jenkinsci/docker
Language: powershell
Docker official jenkins repo

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mandiant/flare-vm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mandiant/flare-vm
Language: powershell
A collection of software installations scripts for Windows systems that allows you to easily setup and maintain a reverse engineering environment on a VM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/ARI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/ARI
Language: powershell
Azure Resource Inventory - It's a Powerful tool to create EXCEL inventory from Azure Resources with low effort

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/fabric-toolbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/fabric-toolbox
Language: powershell
Fabric toolbox is a repository of tools, accelerators, scripts, and samples to accelerate your success with Microsoft Fabric, brought to you by Fabric CAT.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/hve-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/hve-core
Language: powershell
A refined collection of Hypervelocity Engineering components (instructions, prompts, agents, and skills) to start your project off right, or upgrade your existing projects to get the most out of all Copilots

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/navcontainerhelper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/navcontainerhelper
Language: powershell
Official Microsoft repository for BcContainerHelper, a PowerShell module, which makes it easier to work with Business Central Containers on Docker.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: psmux/psmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/psmux/psmux
Language: powershell
Tmux on Windows Powershell - tmux for PowerShell, Windows Terminal, cmd.exe. Includes psmux, pmux, and tmux commands. This is native Powershell Tmux designed for Windows in Rust 🦀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: samratashok/nishang
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/samratashok/nishang
Language: powershell
Nishang - Offensive PowerShell for red team, penetration testing and offensive security.
